title: Intro to multi-agent systems with ADK
summary: Google Cloud Tech introduces the Agent Development Kit, a framework that simplifies building and testing multi-agent systems. The tutorial covers creating agents, equipping them with custom tools like real-time date retrieval and Google Search, and using a web interface for debugging.
